name: My English Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash, peel, and boil potatoes until tender. Mash well or use leftover mashed potatoes of the same weight.
2. Place potatoes in a large mixing bowl. Add water at 100°F.
3. Add salt and yeast to the mixture. Turn mixer on medium speed and beat well.
4. Gradually add 3 cups flour, beating for an additional 2 minutes.
5. Remove bowl from mixer, cover, and let rise for 30 minutes until proofed.
6. Return bowl to mixer and beat for 2 minutes.
7. Add additional flour until a soft dough is formed. Knead lightly.
8. Divide dough into 3-ounce portions. Roll each portion into a round shape and flatten.
9. If using a griddle, place on a floured surface and let rise, covered, for 30-45 minutes.
10. Place on a griddle at moderate heat. When done on one side, turn and continue cooking the other side in the same manner.
11. If baking, place on a baking sheet with cornmeal sprinkled on it, covered, and let rise for 30-45 minutes.
12. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for about 15-20 minutes until lightly browned and hollow sounding.
